title: hibbertia oblongata
intro: Hibbertia oblongata, also known as Guinea flower, is a small, herbaceous plant native to Australia, characterized by its yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Hibbertia oblongata is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
